sqlMap.select: SELECT member_id, login_id, name, grade, point FROM member WHERE member_id = #id#
SELECT member_id, login_id, name, grade, point FROM member WHERE login_id = #loginId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO member (login_id, name, grade, point) VALUES (#loginId#, #name#, 'C', 0)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.update: UPDATE member SET point = point - #usePoint# WHERE member_id = #memberId#
UPDATE member SET point = point + #earnPoint# WHERE member_id = #memberId#
